# Desktop entry / Linux launcher file
if(UNIX AND NOT APPLE)
    configure_file(strata.cmake.desktop strata.desktop @ONLY)
endif()

# Generated by Chatgpt
if(APPLE)
    set(APP_ICON "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/images/application-icon.icns")

    set_source_files_properties(${APP_ICON} PROPERTIES
        MACOSX_PACKAGE_LOCATION "Resources"
    )

    target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${APP_ICON})

    set_target_properties(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PROPERTIES
        MACOSX_BUNDLE_ICON_FILE "application-icon.icns"
    )
elseif(UNIX)
    install(FILES
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/strata.desktop
        DESTINATION .
        )
    install(FILES
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/images/application-icon.svg
        DESTINATION .
        RENAME strata.svg
        )
endif()
